egypt.title: Goodbye Egypt, with respect and regrets
body: Egypt leave with pain, but also with pride.
They were very close to a historic win over Argentina, and led 2–0 before losing 3–2 in a cruel ending.
If this was Salah’s last great World Cup stage, he leaves as a true Egyptian football legend.

england.title: Goodbye England — one step short of another final
england.kicker: Eliminated in the semi-final · Argentina 2–1 England
body: England leave the World Cup one victory short of the final after a 2–1 defeat by Argentina.
The Three Lions produced a strong tournament, but Argentina were sharper in the decisive moments.
Bellingham, Kane and this generation leave disappointed, yet firmly established among world football’s leading contenders.
